title: Geothermal Logging Tool-String Ordering: Maximize Calibration-Cache Reuse
strategies: naive reference: assemble modules in natural module-id order (baseline, maps to 0.1)
frequency-descending: put the most-used sensor modules first so many tool strings share their leading calibration; ignores co-occurrence so groups get scattered
co-occurrence / trie-size aware ordering that keeps tightly-grouped modules contiguous while common modules stay in front
frequency-seeded pairwise-swap local search directly on the reuse (trie-size) objective, capturing both common-module fronting and group contiguity
